name: product_page_1_products_tea-bags

observed_strengths.observation: Both 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy with Shop' (Shop Pay express) buttons are present above the fold, giving a one-tap accelerated checkout path
'Frequently bought together' bundle widget with pre-checked add-ons (Tea Bags + Organic Black Tea + Tea Infuser) and an 'Add selected to cart' button
'Complete Your Ritual' cross-sell row recommends four complementary products below the description
Shop Pay installments offer ('Pay over time for orders over $35') reduces payment friction
Structured, scannable description with 'Why We Love It', 'How to Use', and a 30-Day Warranty mention

missing_or_weak.observation: Reviews widget is present but empty ('No reviews yet') — zero social proof at the point of decision
No subscribe-and-save / replenishment option on a consumable product, leaving recurring revenue on the table
No JSON-LD Product structured data on the PDP, weakening rich-result eligibility in search

purchase_path_notes: Single-step add-to-cart with Shop Pay express alternative; AOV is actively encouraged via a 'Frequently bought together' bundle and a 'Complete Your Ritual' cross-sell.
